name: starlette
why: BadHost — request.url is built from the inbound Host header; bypasses URL-path auth checks

name: urllib3
why: Proxy-Authorization header leaked to the origin on cross-origin redirect

name: Jinja2
why: XSS via the xmlattr filter accepting keys with spaces/quotes

name: PyYAML
why: Arbitrary code execution via the FullLoader constructor

name: requests
why: Certificate verification bypass persisting across a Session after first verify=False

name: Werkzeug
why: Debugger PIN bypass / RCE when the interactive debugger is exposed

name: aiohttp
why: Directory traversal in static file serving when follow_symlinks=True

name: cryptography
why: Bleichenbacher timing oracle in RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 decryption

name: setuptools
why: Remote code execution via the package_index download/install path
